Off Calendar Sep-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Brian S. O'Malley, Esq. of GLASPY & GLASPY, INC. (925-947-1300) for defendants / moving parties Goodrich Corporation and Clark Equipment Company

RULING:
Defendants Goodrich Corporation and Clark Equipment Company's motion to dismiss action for delay in prosecution.
